# Knowledge.md Template

# Workspaces

- billing-service — billing, invoices, payments
- auth-service — auth, JWT, login
- inventory — stock, warehouse
- user-portal — frontend portal
- analytics — dashboard, reporting
- order-service — orders, shipping
- notification-service — email, sms
- search-service — indexing, search
- payment-gateway — Stripe, PayPal
- data-pipeline — ETL, Kafka
